parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "session_id": "{{ $('Parse Feedback').first().json.updated_session.session_id }}",
  "evaluation": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Feedback').first().json.evaluation_result) }},
  "feedback": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Feedback').first().json.feedback) }},
  "mastery_update": {
    "topic": "{{ $('Parse Feedback').first().json.question.topic }}",
    "previous_mastery": {{ $('Parse Feedback').first().json.mastery_calculation.prev_mastery }},
    "current_mastery": {{ $('Parse Feedback').first().json.current_topic_mastery }},
    "mastery_threshold": 85,
    "topic_mastered": {{ $('Parse Feedback').first().json.topic_mastered }},
    "session_complete": {{ $('Parse Feedback').first().json.session_complete }},
    "remediation_mode": {{ $('Parse Feedback').first().json.updated_session.remediation_mode || false }},
    "remediation_entered": {{ $('Parse Feedback').first().json.remediation_entered || false }},
    "remediation_exited": {{ $('Parse Feedback').first().json.remediation_exited || false }}
  },
  "next_question": {{ $json.next_question !== null && $json.next_question !== undefined ? JSON.stringify($json.next_question) : 'null' }},
  "session_summary": {{ $json.session_summary !== undefined && $json.session_summary !== null ? JSON.stringify($json.session_summary) : 'null' }},
  "feedback_report": {{ $json.feedback_report !== undefined && $json.feedback_report !== null ? JSON.stringify($json.feedback_report) : 'null' }},
  "qa_review": {{ $json.full_qa_review !== undefined && $json.full_qa_review !== null ? JSON.stringify($json.full_qa_review) : 'null' }},
  "rubric_evaluation": {{ $('Parse Feedback').first().json.rubric_evaluation ? JSON.stringify($('Parse Feedback').first().json.rubric_evaluation) : null }},
  "session_progress": {
    "question_number": {{ $('Parse Feedback').first().json.updated_session.question_number }},
    "current_topic": "{{ $('Parse Feedback').first().json.updated_session.selected_topic }}",
    "current_difficulty": "{{ $('Parse Feedback').first().json.updated_session.current_difficulty }}",
    "topics_remaining": {{ $('Parse Feedback').first().json.updated_session.remaining_topics.length }},
    "overall_accuracy": {{ $('Parse Feedback').first().json.updated_session.total_questions_asked > 0 ? Math.round(($('Parse Feedback').first().json.updated_session.correct_answers / $('Parse Feedback').first().json.updated_session.total_questions_asked) * 100) : 0 }},
    "remediation_mode": {{ $('Parse Feedback').first().json.updated_session.remediation_mode || false }},
    "remediation_questions": {{ $('Parse Feedback').first().json.updated_session.remediation_questions || 0 }},
    "session_state": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Feedback').first().json.updated_session) }}
  }
}

nodes.name: Respond - Answer Result with Next Question

parameters.query: ={{ JSON.stringify({ session_id: $('Webhook - Submit Answer').first().json.body.session_id, 'current_question.question_id': $('Webhook - Submit Answer').first().json.body.question_id }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
// Build initial ame_session_updates document from session data
// This runs at session START so submit-answer can find session state
// even for the very first answer (before any answer is processed)
const sessionData = $('Parse & Validate Mastery Profile').first().json;

return [{ json: {
  session_id:            sessionData.session_id,
  learner_id:            sessionData.learner_id,
  // updated_session mirrors the full session state - same as Flow 2 writes
  updated_session: {
    session_id:                sessionData.session_id,
    learner_id:                sessionData.learner_id,
    mastery_profile:           sessionData.mastery_profile,
    selected_topic:            sessionData.selected_topic,
    all_topics:                sessionData.all_topics,
    remaining_topics:          sessionData.remaining_topics,
    current_difficulty:        sessionData.current_difficulty,
    question_number:           sessionData.question_number,
    mastery_score:             sessionData.mastery_score,
    total_questions_asked:     sessionData.total_questions_asked,
    correct_answers:           sessionData.correct_answers,
    consecutive_correct:       sessionData.consecutive_correct,
    consecutive_wrong:         sessionData.consecutive_wrong,
    session_history:           sessionData.session_history,
    topic_scores:              sessionData.topic_scores,
    mastery_threshold:         sessionData.mastery_threshold,
    max_questions_per_topic:   sessionData.max_questions_per_topic,
    session_started_at:        sessionData.session_started_at,
    session_status:            'active',
    remediation_mode:          false,
    remediation_questions:     0,
    max_remediation_questions: 6
  },
  // mastery_calculation is null at session start (no answer yet)
  mastery_calculation:   null,
  topic_mastered:        false,
  session_complete:      false,
  current_topic_mastery: 0,
  remediation_mode:      false,
  remediation_entered:   false,
  remediation_exited:    false,
  update_timestamp:      sessionData.session_started_at
}}];
